case_title: WEI CAI HUANG VS. JIMMY ENG

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN COURT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---NELSON TSE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY HUANG, WEI CAI AS TO DEFENDANT ENG, JIMMY MR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-23-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF HUANG, WEI CAI
